visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on a man with dark, disheveled hair, wearing a black t-shirt and a dark jacket. He is in a dimly lit, green-hued environment, standing in front of a metal grate. The audio is filled with a low, ominous, and suspenseful ambient score. A deep, resonant, and slightly distorted hum creates a tense and unsettling atmosphere, suggesting a quiet but dangerous or confined space. He initially looks down with a somber expression, then lifts his head and looks off-camera with a concerned and slightly fearful look. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters are visible. The camera cuts to an extreme close-up of an older man's face. He has graying hair and is looking slightly to his right with a serious, intense, and slightly worried expression. The lighting is dark and moody, with a green tint, highlighting the contours of his face. The same white Chinese characters remain in the top left corner. The shot is static, holding on his focused gaze. There is no dialogue or any other sound effects, allowing the atmospheric music to build a feeling of anticipation and unease.
